summary: Add a JSON Schema validation middleware to the ingestion endpoint that checks records against the expected schema before forwarding to the pipeline

design_decisions.decision: Use JSON Schema for record validation
design_decisions.rationale: Schemas already exist for all record types and can be reused without new dependencies

design_decisions.decision: Validate at the HTTP handler level before enqueuing
design_decisions.rationale: Fail fast — rejected records never touch the queue, reducing wasted processing
